waits.waitFor: SRM settlement creation/search screen is visible
waits.evidence: A settlement search form or creation entry title is visible.
waits.antiPattern: Do not use fixed sleeps unless there is no observable state.

waits.waitFor: Candidate settlement items or explicit empty-result message is visible
waits.evidence: Result table, item count, or no-result message is visible.
waits.antiPattern: Do not assume query completed because the click returned.

waits.evidence: Reviewer approval is recorded before the final create action.
waits.antiPattern: Auto mode must not skip final create approval.

waits.waitFor: SRM creation success message and settlement number are visible
waits.evidence: Success message plus settlement number are visible in the current run.
waits.antiPattern: Do not claim COMPLETE without a current-run settlement number or explicit blocked state.
